use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with engaging visual feedback on hover
Interactive button elements for forms and navigation
Eye-catching buttons for marketing and landing pages
Brand-colored buttons with customizable gradient start and end colors
Modern web application buttons with micro-interactions
ai_summary: A reusable button component featuring a smooth gradient slide animation that transitions from left to right on hover, with the text color shifting to white during the interaction. The button includes a subtle scale animation on hover and accepts customizable color-from and color-to props for flexible brand theming.
